tagline: Your ultimate destination for movies and series. Watch movies and TV shows online for free with no ads or tracking! We do not host or own any content — all media is provided by third-party sources.

legal.what-we-do: Cineko is a free streaming guide that indexes publicly available content from third-party providers. We do not host, store, or distribute any video files.
legal.no-collection: We do not collect personal data, IP addresses, or viewing history. No cookies are used for tracking. Your privacy is 100% respected.
legal.third-party: All content is sourced from external providers. We do not own, control, or endorse any of the media displayed. All rights belong to their respective owners.
